title: KitchenCraft Oval Handled Stainless Steel Spaghetti Server, Pasta Serving Spoon, Cooking Kitchen Utensil, Serving Spoon and Scoop, Dishwasher Safe, 31cm
features: EFFORTLESS PASTA SERVING: Easily strain and serve both long and short pasta without soggy results or messy spills.
DURABLE STIFF PRONGS: Securely grab large portions of spaghetti while the built-in drainage hole lets excess water flow back into the pot.
SLEEK AND STYLISH: Stylish stainless steel finish makes this pasta spoon perfect for cooking and elegant enough to serve directly at the table.
PART OF KITCHENCRAFT PROFESSIONAL: Premium-quality kitchen tools designed for outstanding everyday performance.
EASY CARE: Once you're done you can clean easily with the utensil being dishwasher safe, making it a great addition to your kitchen tool collection and suitable for daily use.
QUALITY GUARANTEED: Covered by KitchenCraft's 25-year guarantee for piece of mind.
description: From the manufacturer KitchenCraft Professional Stainless Steel Pasta Server / Spaghetti Spoon (32 cm) Everyday kitchen tools, extraordinary quality We all love pasta. But we don’t love big clumps of stuck-together spaghetti or waterlogged linguine. And we’re bugged by how tricky it is to serve too. If only there was one utensil that tackled all of these problems. Say hello to KitchenCraft Professional’s Stainless Steel Spaghetti Spoon. This simple, study tool is like a spoon with teeth. Stir your pasta, and its stiff prongs help to separate the pieces to prevent clumping. And when it’s cooked? Simply scoop a serving, and the prongs will hold any spaghetti strands while water drains back into the pan. It’s ideal for long pasta like spaghetti and tagliatelle, but can be used to serve short varieties like penne and fusilli too. And because it’s a KitchenCraft Professional tool, you can rely on it to get the job done and to last and last. It’s made of robust stainless steel, with a shiny finish that looks great in any kitchen. Length: 32 cm (12½ inches) Dishwasher safe Key Features No messy spills Scoop your spaghetti, linguine, tagliatelle or vermicelli with this pasta server’s durable prongs. They grip long pasta to prevent it slipping off before it reaches your plate. Put a stop to soggy pasta This spaghetti spoon has a hole in its bowl, which allows excess water to drip back into the pan. The hole lets water out but keeps small pasta shapes in the bowl, so there’s less mess! Scoop every strand Some pasta serving spoons are just too short. With its long handle, however, this one scoops right to the bottom of the pan, so you can scoop every last piece of pasta with ease. Stainless steel construction You can rely on this pasta server on a daily basis. It’s made of high-quality stainless steel, which won’t rust or stain, and is really easy to clean – just pop rinse it by hand or pop it in the dishwasher. Smart looks Another benefit of stainless steel? It looks great! This pasta spoon’s shiny finish will complement any kitchen, and even looks good enough to serve at the table. Convenient storage Done scooping and serving your pasta? Storing this spaghetti spoon is an absolute doddle! It features a built-in hanging loop, so you can pop it up on a utensils rack. Stainless Steel Kitchen Tools from KitchenCraft Professional KitchenCraft’s Professional range has been created to provide two things – exceptional quality, and exceptional value for money. Its stainless steel tools combine tried-and-tested designs with quality materials to provide you with long-lasting performance. Explore the full range today by typing ‘KitchenCraft Professional’ into your Amazon search bar.
